column3: "Corn supports digestion" refers to its ability to help break down food for better absorption.

"Corn promotes weight loss" refers to its ability to assist people in consuming a balanced diet which may result in weight
          loss as an outcome, not directly because of corn itself.
"Corn protects against free radicals" refers to its ability to provide antioxidants that help shield cells from damage caused by harmful substances known as free radicals.
"Corn enhances immune function" refers to its ability to boost a body's natural defenses against illnesses and diseases.
"Corn improves skin health" refers to its ability to nourish the skin and provide essential nutrients that can enhance its appearance and overall well-being.
"Corn reduces inflammation" refers to its ability to lessen the body's swelling, irritation, or redness caused by diseases, injuries, or other conditions.

"Corn boosts energy levels" refers to its ability to provide essential nutrients like carbohydrates which give a person 
         an increase in their overall energy.
"Corn supports cardiovascular health" refers to its nutrient contribution to heart health.
"Corn promotes healthy bone growth" refers to its nutrients that are vital for strengthening our skeleton and improving bone density.
"Corn reduces risk of chronic diseases" refers to its nutritional attributes having health benefits linked to preventing or minimizing effects that can lead to chronic ailments.
